title: Wrong behavior after dfflibmap with special cell

features.name: async reset DFF with active-low reset and reset-to-one behavior
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset using negedge resetn, where reset action sets register to 1

features.name: liberty DFF cell with next_state formula and single QN output
features.description: Code should include a liberty library cell definition with DFF that has next_state defined as complement of D and only QN output pin

features.name: dfflibmap synthesis pass with liberty file containing DFF cells
features.description: Code should include dfflibmap command with a liberty file that contains DFF cells with next_state logic, applied to a design with async reset flip-flop
